title: PvP PixelZ
description:
This PvP‑focused resource pack refreshes the look of essential Minecraft items, giving them a cleaner and more distinctive style
for 1.21.x version
body:
This PvP‑focused resource pack refreshes the look of essential Minecraft items, giving them a cleaner and more distinctive style:

🔹 Diamond Armor: updated textures for chestplate, boots, helmet, and leggings

🔹 Netherite Armor: redesigned chestplate, boots, helmet, and leggings

🔹 Iron Armor: new textures for chestplate, boots, helmet, and leggings

⚠️ Note: armor appearance on the player model is unchanged — only inventory and held items are modified

Additionally:

🛠️ All tools (diamond, netherite, and iron) have new textures

❌ Hoes remain with the default look
